heading: Indexes
body:
This collection contains the following indexes:

| Name                                      | Index                                            | Description                                                                     | Properties |
| ----------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- |
| \_id\_                                    | \{ "\_id": 1 }                                   | Primary key index on \_id field.                                                |            |
| property\_type\_1\_room\_type\_1\_beds\_1 | \{"property\_type": 1,"room\_type": 1,"beds": 1} | Compound index on the property\_type, room\_type and beds fields.               | Compound   |
| name\_1                                   | \{ "name": 1 }                                   | Single field ascending index on the name field for queries on the listing name. |            |
| address.location\_2dsphere                | \{"address.location": "2dsphere"}                | Geospatial 2dsphere index on the address.location GeoJSON format field.         | Sparse     |
